metadata.description: Ask a video a question and /watch fetches only the evidence that answers it: 60-80% fewer tokens than whole-timeline sampling, equal-or-better answers in blind judging. Fork of Bradley Bonanno's claude-video — same easy install, evidence mode added.

plugins.name: watch
plugins.description: Watch a video (URL or local path). Question-aware evidence retrieval (chapter roll-up, numeric guard, cue frames) on top of the original download/frames/transcript pipeline. Falls back to the original behavior automatically on any failure.
